name: Concrete Pumping Holdings, Inc.
business: Concrete Pumping Holdings, Inc. provides concrete pumping services and concrete waste management services in the United States and United Kingdom. The company serves general contractors and concrete finishing companies in the commercial, infrastructure, and residential construction sectors. It operates under the Brundage-Bone, Camfaud, and Eco-Pan brands.

exposures.sentence: Their core business is the provision of concrete pumping services to general contractors and concrete finishing companies in the commercial, infrastructure and residential sectors.
Our customer base consists of general contractors or concrete contractors that span across the commercial, infrastructure and residential end markets.
Our complementary Eco-Pan business provides concrete washout services to customers.

catalysts.event: Contractual commitment for capital expenditures of $35.5 million for purchases of property and equipment, expected to be paid within the next twelve months.
catalysts.sentence: Additionally, the Company was contractually committed for $35.5 million of capital expenditures for purchases of property and equipment and these are expected to be paid in the next twelve months.
